name: Swing Pros Atlanta
about: Swing Pros Atlanta is an indoor golf training facility offering lessons and practice space for over 10 years. They utilize FlightScope technology for simulation and data analysis, providing both in-studio and online instruction options. The facility focuses on a structured teaching process with various lesson packages and membership options, catering to different skill levels and goals.
why_golfers_like_it: FlightScope simulator technology for advanced analysis
Structured 'Swing Pros Process' for lasting improvement
1000 sq ft indoor putting and chipping green
10% discount on services and packages for members

simulator_hardware.notes: Used for simulation and lesson data analysis

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't explicitly state whether clubs are provided, so it's recommended to bring your own or contact the venue directly.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answers: There is no mention of food or drink service on-site, suggesting BYOB may be allowed, but this is not confirmed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify a time estimate for playing 18 holes on the simulator.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: There is no information about child-friendly amenities or policies available on the website.
